description:
Skytuneup is a unique and disruptive platform that enables companies to save up to 80% of their cloud consumption, via start-stop automation and hourly right-sizing of resources for full optimization and 100% snapshot availability. Platform uses Serverless Technologies on AWS to build and run the platform without thinking about servers.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO

#AWS #AmazonWebServices #CloudComputing #ThisIsMyArchitecture
